Title: First Access Flow
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Check if the "Accesso all'app" node is displayed
3. Proceed with the flow
4. Check if the "Start" action is executed
5. Check if the "Utente gia' registrato?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The application starts
- The "Start" action is executed
- The "Utente gia' registrato?" decision node is reached

Title: First Access Flow - No Access
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Check if the "Accesso all'app" node is displayed
3. Proceed with the flow
4. Check if the "1° Accesso" decision node is reached
5. Check if the "Registrazione" action is executed
Expected Result:
- The application starts
- The "1° Accesso" decision node is reached
- The "Registrazione" action is executed

Title: Home Screen Flow
Test Steps:
1. Reach the home screen
2. Check if the "HOME" node is displayed
3. Check if the "TRAGITTO IN CORSO?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The home screen is displayed
- The "HOME" node is displayed
- The "TRAGITTO IN CORSO?" decision node is reached

Title: Home Screen Flow - Route in Progress
Preconditions: User is logged in and a route is in progress
Test Steps:
1. Reach the home screen
2. Check if the "HOME" node is displayed
3. Check if the "AVVIA TRAGITTO" action is executed
4. Check if the "TRAGITTO TERMINATO?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The home screen is displayed
- The "AVVIA TRAGITTO" action is executed
- The "TRAGITTO TERMINATO?" decision node is reached

Title: Home Screen Flow - Route Not in Progress
Preconditions: User is logged in and no route is in progress
Test Steps:
1. Reach the home screen
2. Check if the "HOME" node is displayed
3. Check if the "CALCOLO EMISSIONI" action is executed
4. Check if the "TRAGITTO TERMINATO?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The home screen is displayed
- The "CALCOLO EMISSIONI" action is executed
- The "TRAGITTO TERMINATO?" decision node is reached

Title: Home Screen Flow - Change Section
Test Steps:
1. Reach the home screen
2. Check if the "HOME" node is displayed
3. Choose to change section
4. Check if the "MENU ORIZZONTALE" action is executed
Expected Result:
- The home screen is displayed
- The "MENU ORIZZONTALE" action is executed

Title: Statistics Flow
Test Steps:
1. Reach the statistics screen
2. Check if the "STATISTICHE" action is executed
3. Check if the "VISUALIZZA REPORT SETTIMANALE?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The statistics screen is displayed
- The "STATISTICHE" action is executed
- The "VISUALIZZA REPORT SETTIMANALE?" decision node is reached

Title: Statistics Flow - Weekly Report
Test Steps:
1. Reach the statistics screen
2. Choose to visualize the weekly report
3. Check if the "REPORT SETTIMANALE" action is executed
4. Check if the "VUOI CAMBIARE SEZIONE?" decision node is reached
Expected Result:
- The weekly report is displayed
- The "REPORT SETTIMANALE" action is executed
- The "VUOI CAMBIARE SEZIONE?" decision node is reached

Title: Profile View
Test Steps:
1. Reach the profile screen
2. Check if the "4.2.5 PROFILO" action is executed
3. Check if the "VISUALIZZA DATI PERSONALI" action is executed
Expected Result:
- The profile screen is displayed
- The "4.2.5 PROFILO" action is executed
- The "VISUALIZZA DATI PERSONALI" action is executed

Title: Account Update Flow
Test Steps:
1. Reach the profile screen
2. Choose to update the account
3. Enter new personal data
4. Check if the "AGGIORNA DATI" action is executed
Expected Result:
- The user's personal data is updated
- The "AGGIORNA DATI" action is executed

Title: Logout Flow
Test Steps:
1. Reach the profile screen
2. Choose to logout
3. Check if the "LOGOUT" action is executed
Expected Result:
- The user is logged out
- The "LOGOUT" action is executed

Title: Login Sequence
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Check if the "login avvenuto" message is displayed
Expected Result:
- The user is logged in
- The "login avvenuto" message is displayed

Title: Login Sequence - Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Enter invalid credentials
3. Check if an error message is displayed
Expected Result:
- The login fails
- An error message is displayed

Title: Route Calculation Flow
Test Steps:
1. Start a route
2. Check if the "calcolo e invio dati" message is sent
3. Check if the route is added to the database
4. Check if the emissions data is returned
5. Check if the emissions data is displayed to the user
Expected Result:
- The route is calculated and added to the database
- The emissions data is returned and displayed to the user
